base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_red_skeleton_walk_regenerate — a character from 1986 castlevania. Red skeleton — 2-frame walk + 1 collapse-to-bones state. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Red skeleton — 2-frame walk + 1 collapse-to-bones state; bones auto-regenerate after timeout forming walking skeleton again; cannot be permanently killed without Holy Water. Level 5 Prison, Level 6
